macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: Trump Trade Chief Defends Tariffs Amid Surging Inflation and Low Consumer Sentiment
items.summary: U.S. Trade Representative Jamieson Greer touted tariffs and industrial policies as key to boosting manufacturing, despite March inflation hitting a two-year high driven by energy costs and record-low consumer sentiment. The administration insists economic pain is temporary, countering Democratic criticism linking tariffs and foreign policy to rising costs.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: OpenClaw 4.10 Update Revolutionizes AI Agents with Active Memory
items.summary: The latest OpenClaw 4.10 release introduces an active memory sub-agent that checks prior user interactions before responding, fixing memory issues and enhancing agent performance. This update is hailed as a game-changer for AI agent functionality.
items.source: YouTube - No Priors: AI, Machine Learning, Tech, & Startups

items.title: Hermes Agent from Nous Research Surpasses OpenClaw in Popularity
items.summary: The open-source Hermes agent is rapidly gaining traction over OpenClaw due to its self-improving loop that learns from mistakes, demonstrated in real-world tests on NVIDIA DGX Spark for tasks like securing sponsorships.
items.source: YouTube - AI News & Strategy Daily | Nate B Jones

items.title: Liquid AI Releases LFM2.5-VL-450M: Tiny Vision-Language Model for On-Device Use
items.summary: Liquid AI launched LFM2.5-VL-450M, a 450M parameter vision-language model trained on 28 trillion tokens, capable of image captioning, visual QA, object detection, and JSON outputs, optimized for local devices.

items.title: NVIDIA's DreamDojo Achieves Breakthrough in AI Video Prediction and Robot Dynamics
items.summary: NVIDIA's DreamDojo trains AI on 44,000 hours of human video data with actions to predict next frames accurately, outperforming prior methods and advancing understanding of real-world physics for robotics.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Multiple New RTS Games Announced with Demos, Releases, and Updates
items.summary: Developers released updates for Dust Front's destruction mechanics, Sanctuary: Shattered Sun multiplayer gameplay, Defcon Zero's new art, and new indie RTS titles like Temporal Titans and Crown of Greed. Age of Empires IV and Age of Mythology Retold received new DLC, while Broken Arrow added free DLC.
items.source: YouTube - New RTS Games, Demos, Releases & Updates

items.title: IGN Game Scoop! Covers Zelda Remaster Leak and New Star Fox Game
items.summary: The latest IGN podcast discusses major news including a leaked Zelda remaster and announcements for a new Star Fox game, highlighting the week's biggest gaming developments.

items.title: Descent Third Edition Board Game Cancelled by Fantasy Flight
items.summary: Fantasy Flight Games is sunsetting Descent Third Edition, despite recent digital implementation news, marking the end of the board game's third iteration.

items.title: Wize Wizard Faces Financial Issues in Gaming Industry
items.summary: Board game publisher Wize Wizard is dealing with reported financial troubles, amid other industry updates like Mechs vs Minions reprint.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.
